item_tooltip.dissolver_enhanced.crystal_: Ua nele kekahi mea, ʻaʻole hiki iaʻu ke kiʻi i ia mea...
emc.title: EMC: §6%s
wireless_open.fail: ʻAʻohe poloka Dissolver i loaʻa ma kahi radius poloka %d!
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.root.des: E ho'āʻo iā Dissolver Enhanced. ʻOiaʻiʻo, mahalo.
advancements.story.place_dissolver.title: Hoʻopau i ke kūkulu hou ʻana
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.di: E aʻo i ka lepo. ʻAʻole hiki ke ola hou ka hoʻokele waiwai.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.wo: E aʻo i ka lāʻau a ʻike i ka loaʻa ʻana o ka waiwai kālā i nā lāʻau.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.di: E aʻo i nā daimana. E ʻoluʻolu e noho haʻahaʻa i mua o ka pōhaku.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.ex: Na wai i kono i keia?
E aʻo i kahi mea mai waho o ka inoa inoa o Minecraft.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.gr: E aʻo i ka mauʻu. He helu ʻenehana kēia.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.co: E aʻo i ka pōhaku pōhaku. ʻO kekahi ʻano, he hoʻopukapuka mau kēia.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.st: E aʻo i kahi lāʻau. Ke nānā nei ʻo Wall Street.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.ro: E aʻo i ka ʻiʻo popopo. He waiwai kona, akā he aha ke kumu kūʻai?
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.eg: ʻO nā moa i hoʻokō ʻole ʻia
E aʻo i kahi hua manu. He ʻano omelet ka nui o ka wā e hiki mai ana.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.em: E aʻo i nā emeralds. Makemake nā kamaʻāina i kahi ʻōlelo.
Paʻa i 1,000 EMC. Ke hoʻomaka nei ka lepo e mahalo iā ʻoe.
Paʻa 1,000,000 EMC. ʻO ka hoʻokele waiwai i kēia manawa ka nui o nā mea hoʻonaninani.
Piliona i loko o ka pahu
Paʻa 1,000,000,000 EMC. E ʻoluʻolu e hoʻōki i ke kūʻai ʻana i nā cobblestone e hiki mai ana.
Paʻa i 1,000,000,000,000 EMC. I kēia manawa e hoʻololi ke ao holoʻokoʻa iā ʻoe.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.ta: E aʻo i 100 mau mea. Hoʻonohonoho wale ʻia ka hoʻomanaʻo.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.ho: E aʻo i 500 mau mea. Aia paha kahi ʻōnaehana ma ʻaneʻi.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.ev: He Kumukuai ko kela me keia Block
E aʻo i 1,000 mau mea. Ua lilo ka ʻatikala i huahana.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.co: E aʻo i kēlā me kēia kala kala. Ua hauʻoli ka papapalapala i kēia manawa.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.dr: E aʻo i ka huamoa Dragon. Ua helu ʻia ka hope.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.orb.orbi: E hana i kāu EMC Orb mua. Ua puni ka panakō i kēia manawa.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.orb.roun: E hoʻokomo i kahi EMC Orb i loko o ka Dissolver. Ua hoʻopau ka orb i kāna mau pepa.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.orb.cond: E hana i kahi EMC Orb ma kahi o 1,000 EMC. He poepoe malia.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.orb.heav: E hana i kahi EMC Orb ma kahi o 1,000,000 EMC. E ʻoluʻolu e hāpai me kou mau kuli.
command.feedback.get.not_found: ʻAʻole hiki ke loaʻa kahi mea pāʻani me ka inoa '%s'!
command.feedback.list.user: Loaʻa iā ʻoe §6%s§r EMC i kēia manawa!
command.feedback.update.give: %s EMC ua hāʻawi ʻia. Waiwai hou: §6
command.feedback.update.set: E hoʻonoho i ka EMC i §6%s
command.feedback.memory.forget: Poina i nā mea a pau i mālama ʻia!
command.feedback.player.not_found: ʻAʻole hiki ke loaʻa kahi mea pāʻani me ka inoa '%s'!
command.feedback.shared_data: ʻAʻole i hoʻāla ʻia ka EMC pilikino!
